articles.title: Drug suspect yields P2.1M worth of shabu in Lucena City
articles.description: LUCENA CITY — Police seized more than P2.1 million worth of suspected shabu (crystal meth) from a female drug suspect during a buy-bust operation in this Quezon provincial capital on Monday, April 27. Lt. Col. Ryan Hernandez, Lucena City police chief, said Tuesday that anti-drug operatives arrested the suspect, identified only as “Collen,” 32, at 7:55 p.m. after she sold P500 worth of shabu to an undercover officer in Barangay Barra. Authorities recovered six sealed plastic sachets and one knot-tied plastic bag containing suspected shabu weighing a total of 120.3 grams. READ: Drug suspect busted in Lucena City sting Based [...]... Keep on reading: Drug suspect yields P2.1M worth of shabu in Lucena City

articles.title: Viral student robber nabbed in Mambaling after armed person report
articles.description: CEBU CITY, Philippines — A 44-year-old man linked to a robbery targeting students along C. Padilla Street was arrested Saturday evening, April 25, after police responded to a report of an armed individual in Barangay Mambaling, Cebu City. The case drew attention on social media after posts about the incident circulated online and went viral, showing the victims injured following the robbery and prompting public concern and calls for action. Robbery link uncovered after armed arrest Police identified the suspect as Jovanny Pebida Pahugot, a resident of Sitio Kahuyan, who was apprehended at around 9:40 p.m. The arrest stemmed from [...]...
